title: Dark Doppelganger - Irons Spells And Spellbooks Addon
description: Summon a boss that looks just like you
body:
![alt text](https://imgur.com/xTB0ZXo.png)

# Dark Doppelganger

A high-difficulty boss mod for 1.20.1 and 1.21.1 inspired by dark magic, spellcasting combat, and multi-phase encounters and Heavily by Irons Spells and Spellbooks!

The Dark Doppelganger is a powerful spell-casting enemy that mirrors player strength, summons minions, and escalates as the fight goes on.

***

![mod](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExdnh0cGlma3M3dGhmOWd3cTBkMDhwdjZvMm1oZWo5dm1samJqYXgxbSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/2k4qxd1GNSpGvuXd7g/giphy.gif)

***

## 🧿 The Dark Doppelganger Boss

The Dark Doppelganger is a **multi-phase boss fight** designed for experienced players.

### Boss Features

*   Multi-phase combat with increasing difficulty
*   Spellcasting melee and ranged attacks
*   Teleports back from the void if knocked off the world
*   Summons hostile minions during combat
*   Dynamic boss music and boss health bar
*   Scales stats and abilities based on configuration
*   Designed for **multiplayer encounters** (supports multiple players fighting at once)

***

## 🔮 Boss Phases

*   **Phase 1:** Standard spellcasting and melee attacks
*   **Phase 2:** Increased aggression and new spell combinations
*   **Final Phase:** Frequent minion summoning, life-drain abilities, and high pressure combat

The boss **cannot be cheesed** easily and is intended to feel like an end-game encounter.

***

## 👁️ Minions

The Dark Doppelganger can summon **hostile minions** during the fight.

### Minion Behavior

*   Attack players aggressively
*   Do NOT attack the boss or other boss minions
*   Automatically choose nearby players as targets
*   Despawn when the boss is defeated
*   Not player-owned and cannot be controlled

Minions are designed to **pressure players**, not act as companions.

***

## Custom Items

![items](https://i.imgur.com/vTjl5SU.jpeg)

*   Shadow Orb - Summon Doppelganger item
*   Doppelganger - Ring +150 Mana +30 Health
*   Elder's Necklace - +200 Mana +25% Eldritch Spell Power
*   Summoner Necklace - +225 Mana +25% Summon Damage

***

## 📜 Custom Spells

This mod includes **two custom spells**, used by the boss and its minions.

*   Jump Portal - Jump/evade fast spell

![portal](https://i.imgur.com/IFaGBA8.png)

*   Summon Minion - Lets you summon your own minion

![minion](https://i.imgur.com/1YMkmCr.png)

### ⚠️ Important

Summon Minion spell is **NOT learnable** by players and **does not appear** in the Scroll Forge.

These spells are used exclusively by the Dark Doppelganger and its summons, but defeating the boss gives you a chance at a spell drop!

***

## 🧙 Spellcasting System

*   Uses **Iron’s Spells & Spellbooks**
*   Fully integrated with spell schools, effects, and animations
*   Compatible with other spell-based mods

***

## How to Summon the Dark Doppelganger

> ⚠️ The Dark Doppelganger is intended to be a dangerous encounter.

*   Use a **Shadow Orb** in the End. Throw it into the void.

***

## ⚙️ Configuration

Most values are configurable:

*   Boss health
*   Damage
*   Armor
*   Spell power
*   Minion strength
*   Hard Mode toggles

***

## ⚔️ Intended Experience

*   Challenging, cinematic boss fight
*   Multiplayer-friendly
*   Spell-heavy combat
*   No PvP abuse or player-owned combat minions
*   Designed for late-game or modpack progression

***

## 🖤 Final Notes

This mod is built to feel like a **true magical boss encounter**, not a standard mob fight.

Prepare well.

Good luck.

***

### **Dependencies**

_1.21.1 Now available for NeoForge_

To enjoy the Dark Doppelganger mod, ensure the following dependencies are installed:

1.  **Forge** (Version: 47.4.10 or higher)
2.  **Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks** (Version: 3.15.0 or higher)
3.  **Curios API** (Version: 5.7.0+1.20.1 or higher)
4.  **Caelus API** (Version: 3.1.0+1.20 or higher)
5.  **GeckoLib** (Version: 4.4.5 or higher)
6.  **Player Animator** (Version: 1.0.2-rc1+1.20 or higher)

***
